title: Mumbai Couple and Their Two Daughters Eat Biryani, Followed by Watermelon; Found Dead Next Morning
description: The deceased have been identified as Abdullah Dokadia (40), his wife Nasreen Dokadia (35), and their daughters Ayesha (16) and Zainab (13), all residents of Ghati Galli in Mughal Building, Pydhonie. Preliminary investigations point towards suspected food poisoning.
